services.name: Hull Cleaning
services.shortDescription: Professional robotic hull cleaning that removes fouling without damaging your antifouling paint.
services.longDescription: Using our Keelcrab Pro underwater robot, we clean your hull in the water — no lift-out needed. Certified nylon brushes remove barnacles, algae, and biofilm while preserving your antifouling coating. Every clean includes HD video documentation and a digital report.

steps.title: Book Your Clean
steps.description: Tell us your boat length, location, and preferred date. We'll confirm within 24 hours.

steps.title: We Clean Your Hull
steps.description: Our Keelcrab Pro robot attaches to your hull and cleans up to 7m² per minute. All debris is captured in our eco-compliant filter bag.

steps.title: Get Your Report
steps.description: Receive HD video footage and a digital before/after report within 24 hours of your clean.

benefits.title: Cut Fuel Costs by Up to 30%
benefits.description: Even light biofilm increases drag by 10–15%. Barnacles and hard fouling can push fuel consumption up by 30%. A clean hull means less resistance, less fuel burned, and more money in your pocket.

benefits.title: Preserve Your Antifouling
benefits.description: A.N.C.C.P. certified nylon brushes remove fouling without damaging your antifouling coating. Regular gentle cleaning prevents heavy growth from bonding to the paint, extending its useful life by 1–2 seasons.

benefits.title: No Lift-Out Required
benefits.description: Skip the £500+ crane fees, the scheduling headache, and the full-day disruption. We clean your hull in the water at your berth — typically in 1–2 hours while you carry on with your day.

benefits.title: Reduce Your Carbon Footprint
benefits.description: Less fuel burned means lower CO₂ emissions. The IMO recognises hull cleaning as an effective tool for reducing greenhouse gas output from vessels — good for the planet and increasingly important for marina compliance.

benefits.title: Prevent Invasive Species
benefits.description: Hull fouling is a primary vector for transporting invasive non-native species between harbours. Regular cleaning removes organisms before they can spread, protecting local marine ecosystems and meeting biosecurity obligations.

benefits.title: HD Video Documentation
benefits.description: Every clean includes HD video footage of your hull shared digitally. See exactly what was removed, confirm the quality of the clean, and build a maintenance record for your vessel over time.

services.name: Hull Inspection
services.shortDescription: Detailed underwater visual condition report using HD camera technology.
services.longDescription: Our Keelcrab Pro's HD camera system provides a comprehensive visual inspection of your hull below the waterline. You receive a full video recording and a written condition report — giving you a clear picture of your hull's health without the cost of a lift-out.

steps.title: Book Your Inspection
steps.description: Tell us your boat length, location, and what you'd like us to focus on.

steps.title: We Inspect Your Hull
steps.description: Our robot scans your entire hull with HD cameras, documenting the waterline, antifoul condition, intakes, and any areas of concern.

steps.title: Get Your Report
steps.description: Receive a visual condition report (PDF + video link) with observations and recommendations.

benefits.title: Catch Problems Early
benefits.description: HD video reveals cracks, corrosion, coating breakdown, and dents before they become expensive repairs. A £100 inspection can prevent a £5,000 emergency haul-out.

benefits.title: Monitor Antifouling Condition
benefits.description: See exactly how your antifouling paint is performing without a costly lift-out. Identify wear patterns, erosion hotspots, and degradation — so you know when repainting is actually needed, not just guessing.

benefits.title: Check Through-Hull Fittings
benefits.description: Water intakes, skin fittings, and anodes are invisible from above — but critical to your boat's safety. Our camera checks every underwater fitting for blockages, corrosion, and wear.

benefits.title: Pre-Purchase Confidence
benefits.description: Considering buying a boat? A visual hull inspection reveals the real condition below the waterline before you commit. Share the HD footage with your surveyor or broker for a more complete picture.

benefits.title: Insurance Documentation
benefits.description: Timestamped HD video provides contemporaneous evidence of your hull's condition at a specific date. Useful for insurance renewals, warranty claims, and sale negotiations.

benefits.title: Optimise Maintenance Scheduling
benefits.description: Stop guessing when your hull needs attention. Inspections tell you exactly when a clean or haul-out is actually needed — saving you money on unnecessary work and preventing neglect.

services.disclaimer: This is a visual condition report delivered by robotic technology. It is not a qualified marine survey and does not replace the opinion of a certified marine surveyor.

quadSafe.description: Precision nylon brushes preserve your antifouling coating — certified to clean without damage.
Eco-compliant debris capture means nothing enters the water. Marina approved.
No lift-out needed. Save £500+ on marina hoist fees and keep your boat in the water.
HD visual reports give you early warning on hull integrity, intakes, and potential issues.
